children.text: Tia’s Culture

Tia is an active and practiced culture that binds us together, and promotes learning and development. We are anchored in excellence and not perfection. This means we’re on a pursuit of constant improvement, and this is driven forward by a community of people who are curious, have a high bar, bring a diversity of perspectives and ways of thinking, are humble and seek to evolve.
Why work at Tia
Competitive Compensation
We offer fair, market-based pay that reflects your skills, experience, and impact. At Tia, we recognize and reward great work to ensure you feel valued from day one.
Broad Health Benefits
We provide medical, dental, and vision coverage with premiums subsidized up to 99% for employee-only plans, and higher subsidies for those earning under $75k. Our dental plan includes orthodontia.
Performance Bonuses
Great work deserves great rewards. We offer performance-based bonuses so that when Tia succeeds, you benefit directly from the company’s success.
Stock Options
Ownership in our mission. Eligible employees receive stock options, giving you a meaningful stake in the future we’re building together and sharing in our growth.
Time Off to Recharge
Recharge on your terms. Whether through flexible PTO or accrued time off, we make sure you have the space to rest and come back refreshed—because balance matters.
Your future matters. We offer a 401(k) plan with a small company match to support your long-term financial security—because every bit helps build a strong foundation.
Parental Leave
Supporting growing families. We provide up to 12 weeks of paid parental leave so new parents have time to focus on what matters most during life’s important moments.
Tech & Home Office Perks
Work your way. Remote and hybrid employees receive high-quality tech, a home office setup stipend, and monthly reimbursements to stay connected and productive from day one.
Peace of Mind Benefits
We’ve got you covered. Our benefits include life insurance, disability coverage, and financial protections to help you and your loved ones feel secure—no matter what life brings.
Let's transform the future of healthcare together
Are you passionate about personalized care delivery? Or using tech to put the soul back in medicine? Join the venture-backed startup changing the game for healthcare.
Life at Tia
Working at Tia means being part of a visionary company, and being surrounded by people who are deeply mission driven. Our Tia team members are passionate about improving the lives of women.
Open positions
Tia has corporate offices in NYC and San Francisco, and Care Teams in NYC, LA, SF, and Arizona — with more locations coming soon!
Stay Connected With Tia
Want to join the Tia team but don’t see a role you’re interested in? Join our Talent Community for future consideration!
Tia's approach to Diversity, Equity & Inclusion
Tia is on a mission to make healthcare both higher-quality and more accessible for all, regardless of age, sex, gender, race, ethnicity, religion, ability, sexual orientation, and economic status.

children.text: Employee Testimonials
Meet some of our Tia team members, and learn more about why they love working at Tia!

Working at Tia has been one of the most rewarding chapters of my career. The problems we’re solving are deeply meaningful, and the people I get to work with every day are mission-driven, kind, and ridiculously smart. There’s a real sense of trust and ownership here. We’re empowered to make bold decisions, try new things, and build the future of women’s healthcare together. It’s fast paced, sometimes messy, but always purpose driven — and that’s what makes it exciting.
Ari S, Product

As a People Leader, I’ve had the opportunity to shape the systems and structures that support our team as we grow. It’s deeply rewarding to build tools and processes that not only drive business forward but also make our teammates’ jobs easier and more fulfilling. I feel incredibly grateful that I get to collaborate with some of the smartest, most driven people I’ve ever worked with, all motivated by a shared mission to make healthcare radically better for women.
Lauren K, Talent Manager

What stands out to me most at Tia is the culture. It’s the foundation of how we work, how we support each other, and how we grow. It’s helped me develop both personally and professionally, giving me a basis to lead with empathy, take on new challenges, and stay grounded in our mission.
As an Engineering Manager, one of the most fulfilling parts of my role is building and nurturing teams. I take a lot of pride in creating the same kind of culture that helped me grow, and seeing my teammates flourish is one of the best feelings in the world.
At the end of the day, it’s all about people. I love our people and I’m constantly inspired by the way we show up for each other and for the patients we serve.
Leo T, Engineering

I've been in tech startups my entire career and while my work has always been challenging, it has not always been personally fulfilling. Part of what drew me to Tia was that people were building a much-needed alternative to a very flawed healthcare system, and that they cared deeply about doing right by our patients. I feel grateful and very privileged to be able to work alongside so many other driven and thoughtful human beings to improve what women's health can look like.
Jessica C, Marketing
